# Stock Picking Report Incoming Delivery Address

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:4145e67200c32d4bc9a792824814440e90f98a8d763057c1580f0f638d73067b
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module extends the functionality of stock and show pick-up address
in incoming reports, like returns.

:::{IMPORTANT}
This is an alpha version, the data model and design can change at any time without warning.
Only for development or testing purpose, do not use in production.
[More details on development status](https://odoo-community.org/page/development-status)
:::

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Use Cases / Context

This module was developed because sometimes in incoming transaction
types it is necessary to show the pick-up address, such as returns.

It will be useful if the carrier has to pick up the goods at the address
where they were delivered.

## Configuration

To configure this module, you need to:

1. Go to Inventory App > Configuration > Operation Type.
2. Select incoming operation type like returns or create new.
3. Activate **Show Pick-up Address in report**.

## Usage

To use this module, you need to:

1. Go to Inventory App.
2. Create transfer with operation type configured to show pick-up
   address in report.
3. Print report **Delivery Slip** or **Picking Operations**.
